title: Predicted false ACK: 'saw it' matches inside 'jigsaw items'
predicted_basis: _classify_text ACK branch matches 'saw it' inside 'jigsaw items' (spec FR-004 predicted trap family; also fires on 'chainsaw items')
failure_mode: substring trap: 'saw it' matches across the word boundary inside 'jigsaw items'; ACK branch fires from incidental phrasing on a substantive work assignment (FR-004)
invariant: verdict keywords must not match across word boundaries
rationale: A direct triage assignment with a requested deliverable must be SPEAK. A shallow keyword/substring classifier baits on the incidental 'saw it' inside 'jigsaw items' and downgrades the assignment to a bare acknowledgement.
